issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property to target Java 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 17-specific code is introduced.

issue-25519/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration to Java 17.
issue-25519/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 17 bytecode and API, overriding any default or inherited settings that might target an older version.
